programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Don and Agnes visit lakefront properties in search of their forever home after retirement.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Amanda and Joe are passionate about fitness and are searching for their dream home that has enough space for a home gym; during their search for a lakefront property, they come across a beautiful traditional home situated on five and a half acres.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Praveeni and Sashien love the finer things in life, especially the opulent look of high-end hotels, and are currently seeking a lakefront property that embodies their travel lifestyle.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Dennis and Melanie hunt for a lake house that can serve as both their home and workspace; Melanie is looking for a space that can accommodate her dance business, while Dennis wants the perfect man cave.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Glen and Sherry have recently become empty nesters and are looking forward to this new stage of life; they are looking to make a permanent move to a lakefront property with space for guests and possible income potential.

programs.title: Lakefront Luxury
programs.desc: Chantal and Keith's dream is to own a lakefront house, but their picky nature has stopped them from settling for anything less than perfect; overall, they have seen 300 properties but have yet to find the one.
